prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约1405名、2639名、1197名、1338名、1004名，整体呈波动走势。2022年曾大幅后移至2639名，随后逐年回升，2025年达到近年最好水平约1004名，较2024年上升约334名，显示报考热度回升；该校在内蒙古理科（物理类）招生计划2021年93人、2022年92人、2023年90人、2024年83人、2025年91人；2026年计划74人，较2025年减少17人，缩招约18.7%，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年位列第20名，近年排名稳定在第20–22名区间，属于国内顶尖工科强校；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及PPT贬低其他专业争议、考试作弊回应态度引发质疑等事件；抖音热度排名第66位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术、管理科学与工程获评A+，仪器科学与技术、光学工程、动力工程及工程热物理、土木工程、城乡规划学、建筑学、机械工程等获评A，A-及以上学科共20个，工科实力突出，与招生大类高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续偏热至高热，天津大学对应工科试验班（智能与计算类、电气信息类、电子科学技术类）直接受益；内蒙古2026年普通高考考生总数约15.4万人，较2025年（历史类+物理类约11.6万）大幅增加，按物理类占比约72%估算约11.1万人，较2025年物理类8.4万人增加约32%，竞争显著加剧；天津大学位于天津市，与内蒙古地理位置较近，属北方高校，对内蒙古考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在内蒙古招生占比约1.5%–2%，属中等偏低水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1004名、2026年缩招约18.7%（缓解竞争）、内蒙古考生大幅增加约32%（加剧竞争）以及学校声誉偏负面但工科实力强劲等因素，缩招与考生增加效应部分抵消。，考虑考生大幅增加带来的竞争加剧效应略强于缩招效应，小幅下调预测位次至约872名，区间767–977名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 1405, 2639, 1197, 1338, and 1004, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2022, it significantly dropped to 2639, then gradually recovered, reaching about 1004 in 2025, the best level in recent years, an increase of about 334 from 2024, indicating a rebound in application popularity. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Inner Mongolia was 93 in 2021, 92 in 2022, 90 in 2023, 83 in 2024, and 91 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 74, a decrease of 17 from 2025, a reduction of about 18.7%, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 20th, with stable rankings in the 20–22 range in recent years, making it a top domestic engineering powerhouse. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving controversies such as PPT disparaging other majors and questionable responses to exam cheating. Its Douyin popularity ranks 66th, rated as average, with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no clear signal of increased application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology, and Management Science and Engineering received A+, while Instrument Science and Technology, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Urban and Rural Planning, Architecture, and Mechanical Engineering received A, with a total of 20 A- or above disciplines, highlighting strong engineering capabilities highly matched with enrollment categories.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be popular to very popular, directly benefiting Tianjin University's corresponding Engineering Experimental Classes (Intelligent and Computing, Electrical and Information, Electronic Science and Technology). In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance exam takers in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase from about 116,000 (history + physics categories) in 2025. Estimating physics category at about 72%, it is about 111,000, an increase of about 32% from 84,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, geographically close to Inner Mongolia, making it a northern university with some regional appeal to Inner Mongolia students. Its enrollment share in Inner Mongolia is about 1.5%–2%, a medium-low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1004, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 18.7% (easing competition), the significant increase in Inner Mongolia students of about 32% (intensifying competition), and the university's somewhat negative reputation but strong engineering capabilities, the effects of enrollment reduction and student increase partially offset. Given that the competition intensification effect from the student increase is slightly stronger than the easing effect from enrollment reduction, the predicted ranking is slightly lowered to about 872, with a range of 767–977.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology College)
- Engineering Experimental Class (National Characteristic Demonstration Software College Intelligent and Computing Category)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium Difficulty)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electrical and Information Category)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Science and Technology Category)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Equipment Design and Manufacturing)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Chemical Engineering and Green Low-Carbon Category)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-Tech Ship and Marine Equipment Intelligent Design and Management)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Water Conservancy)
- Medical Experimental Class (New Medicine and New Engineering Integration Innovation Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 767–977, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Electrical and Information Category, Electronic Science and Technology Category, Intelligent Equipment Design and Manufacturing), with Tier 1 Future Technology College and Intelligent and Computing Category as reach options, and Tier 3 Smart Chemical Engineering and Green Low-Carbon Category, Smart Water Conservancy, etc., as safety choices. Tianjin University has strong engineering capabilities, and categories corresponding to A+ disciplines like Chemical Engineering and Technology and Management Science and Engineering are worth focusing on.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 292, 384, 336, 437, and 343, fluctuating within the 290–440 range. In 2025, the ranking was about 343, a significant increase of about 94 places from 437 in 2024, returning to the median level of recent years. The enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Inner Mongolia was 17 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 26 in 2024, and 20 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 35, an increase of 15 from 2025, a substantial expansion of 75%, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 20th, with a stable ranking in the 20–22 range in recent years. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving controversies over PPTs disparaging other majors and attitudes towards exam cheating responses. Douyin popularity ranking is 66th, with a general evaluation, showing no clear signs of increased application attention. Architecture A, Urban and Rural Planning A, Landscape Architecture A- are highly related to the architecture category in liberal arts (history category) enrollment. Management Science and Engineering A+, Business Administration A correspond to the management direction in the Social Science Experimental Class.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Social Science Experimental Class covers law (socially hot, recommended), Chinese language and literature (recommended), education (differentiated, wait-and-see), with overall popularity moderately high. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance exam takers in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, with history category accounting for about 28%, approximately 43,000, an increase of about 32% from 33,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, a northern municipality, with some regional appeal to Inner Mongolia students. Its enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia liberal arts is about 0.5%–1%, a relatively low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 343, the significant 75% enrollment expansion in 2026 (significantly easing competition), the approximately 32% increase in Inner Mongolia examinees (intensifying competition), and the somewhat negative reputation, the expansion effect far outweighs the examinee increase effect. Given the extremely large expansion but also a notable increase in examinees, the predicted ranking is slightly adjusted upward to about 527, with a range of 464–590.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With rankings within the predicted range of 464–590, Tianjin University only offers two enrollment majors in Inner Mongolia liberal arts. It is recommended to primarily fill the Social Science Experimental Class (relatively safe within the range) and use the Architecture Category as a reach (historically requiring higher rankings). The Social Science Experimental Class allows free choice of majors within the broad category and has no limit on the number of major changes, offering high flexibility.
